description:
GIVEN a subscriber is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is off
AND the selected date has in-progress/live games

steps.action:
WHEN a subscriber is on the Games page
AND game tiles are displayed
AND an in-progress/live game tile has focus
steps.result:
THEN the game tile is increased in size
AND the game tile has a white border
AND there is a slight gradient from the top
AND the away team primary color is displayed in the upper left of the game tile
AND the away team logo is displayed
AND the away team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the away team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the home team primary color is displayed in the upper right of the game tile
AND the home team logo is displayed
AND the home team abbreviation is displayed below the team logo
AND the home team record is displayed below the team abbreviation
AND the current score displays between the away and home team logos
AND a "LIVE" pill indicator is displayed left justified below the match-up header
AND the current inning status is displayed to the right of the Live pill indicator
AND the current pitcher headshot with the primary team color as the background is displayed left justified below the Live indicator
AND the current pitcher name is displayed to the right of their headshot
AND the current pitcher's innings pitched in the game followed by their season ERA are displayed to the right of their headshot, below their name
AND the current batter headshot with the primary team color as the background is displayed left justified below the current pitcher headshot
AND the current batter's name is displayed to the right of their headshot
AND the current batter's game at-bat's followed by their season batting average are displayed to the right of their headshot, below their name
AND the bases/outs indicators display right-center justified in the non-matchup portion of the game tile
AND the bases indicator reflect the current base runners
AND the outs indicator reflect the current inning outs
AND any applicable pills display left justified at the bottom of the game tile
